agmsg.author: fujibee
agmsg.localChanges: Fully re-implemented in Python (standard library only, 3.11+) as a single `agmsg.py` entry point backed by the `agmsg_cli/` package, replacing the entire shell script set. Messages stay in SQLite while configuration and team registration use JSON; the CLI is non-interactive with an optional `--json` envelope (schema_version/ok/command/data). Hook generation, environment/identity/delivery detection, actas/drop, and install were consolidated into the CLI. Dropped legacy `hook on|off`, the Gemini/Antigravity/Copilot agents, Windows support, free-form terminal templates, and generated shell. Retains repository-local ignored runtime state, an idempotent installer that records absolute Python + agmsg.py paths for hooks and refuses (without --reset) to migrate an old shell-era runtime, split Japanese environment instructions, bounded incremental inbox polling, and a maintenance README. Ported upstream's Codex monitor bridge beta to Python, including one-shot unread detection, stdio and WebSocket-over-Unix app-server clients, serialized turn delivery with watchdog re-arming, an outside-sandbox launcher rendezvous, explicit monitor launch, and a generated Python Codex shim. Added a unittest unit/integration suite under tests/.
